introSection: Magnus is a steel roller coaster located at Salitre Magico in Bogotá, Cundinamarca, Colombia.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride opened in 1975 as Corkscrew at Magic Harbor, and was later moved and reopened at Myrtle Beach Pavilion in 1978. It closed on 6 September 1999 and moved to Colombia in 2000, opening as Montaña Rusa. It was eventually repainted to green and renamed to Magnus.

sections.title: Salitre Magico
sections.content: Green track and black supports, used to be red track and white supports and white track and supports when it opened in 2000.

sections.title: Myrtle Beach Pavilion
sections.content: Blue track and white supports, used to be white track with blue rails and white supports.

sections.title: Magic Harbor
sections.content: White track with blue rails and white supports.

fullText:
Magnus is a steel roller coaster located at Salitre Magico in Bogotá, Cundinamarca, Colombia.

The ride opened in 1975 as Corkscrew at Magic Harbor, and was later moved and reopened at Myrtle Beach Pavilion in 1978. It closed on 6 September 1999 and moved to Colombia in 2000, opening as Montaña Rusa. It was eventually repainted to green and renamed to Magnus.





Green track and black supports, used to be red track and white supports and white track and supports when it opened in 2000.

Blue track and white supports, used to be white track with blue rails and white supports.

White track with blue rails and white supports.
